Computation_Method: RDKit Descriptors.MolWt on full modified peptide SMILES

Human_Readable_Definition: Number of unique edit family types
Total number of anchor positions with multiplicity
Anchor density relative to sequence length
Span between min and max anchor positions
Frequency of Alanine at anchor positions
Frequency of Cysteine at anchor positions
Frequency of Aspartate at anchor positions
Frequency of Glutamate at anchor positions
Frequency of Phenylalanine at anchor positions
Frequency of Glycine at anchor positions
Frequency of Histidine at anchor positions
Frequency of Isoleucine at anchor positions
Frequency of Lysine at anchor positions
Frequency of Leucine at anchor positions
Frequency of Methionine at anchor positions
Frequency of Asparagine at anchor positions
Frequency of Proline at anchor positions
Frequency of Glutamine at anchor positions
Frequency of Arginine at anchor positions
Frequency of Serine at anchor positions
Frequency of Threonine at anchor positions
Frequency of Valine at anchor positions
Frequency of Tryptophan at anchor positions
Frequency of Tyrosine at anchor positions
Fraction of hydrophobic residues at anchors
Fraction of charged residues at anchors
Fraction of polar residues at anchors
Fraction of aromatic residues at anchors
Fraction of small residues at anchors
Fraction of edits that are terminal

Computation_Method: sum(1 for e in edits if e.edit_family == n_terminal)
sum(1 for e in edits if e.edit_family == c_terminal)
sum(counts for types not in specific list)

Human_Readable_Definition: Number of edits with paired anchors
Computation_Method: sum(1 for e in edits if len(e.anchor_positions) > 1)

Human_Readable_Definition: Number of positions with multiple edits
Computation_Method: sum(1 for pos in anchor_positions if count(pos) > 1)
